_doc: All building stats. size = footprint in tiles (square). Times in seconds. dropoff lists resource types villagers/boats can deposit. shore = footprint must touch water. Eras gate availability. `desc` is shown in the command card / selection panel (tap a tile on touch to read it).

istana.desc: Your seat of power. MISSION: hold your Istana — and slay the enemy Boss or raze their Istana — to win. It stores all resources and trains villagers.
istana.name: Istana

lumbung.desc: A storehouse — villagers drop off timber, food, gold and camphor here, and it raises your storage cap.
lumbung.name: Lumbung

rumah_kampong.desc: A kampong house — raises your population cap by 5 so you can train more villagers and soldiers.
rumah_kampong.name: Rumah Kampong

kedai_runcit.desc: A market — buy and sell resources for gold, and hire mercenary fighters with gold.
kedai_runcit.name: Kedai Runcit

balai_bomba.desc: Firefighters — automatically douse nearby fires before they spread through your kampong.
balai_bomba.name: Balai Bomba

kebun.desc: A padi farm (sawah) — villagers harvest a steady supply of food here without depleting the land.
kebun.name: Kebun

pangkalan.desc: A waterfront dock — builds fishing boats, war perahu and trade ships. Must touch water.
pangkalan.name: Pangkalan

balai_pahlawan.desc: The barracks — trains your army: Kampilan swordsmen, archers, keris stabbers, javelin throwers and the Lela cannon.
balai_pahlawan.name: Balai Pahlawan

gerai_tukang.desc: The workshop — research upgrades (sharper weapons, armour, fire arrows, faster gathering) to strengthen your kingdom.
gerai_tukang.name: Gerai Tukang

kubu.desc: A watchtower — fires arrows at any enemy that comes near. Your first line of defence; place them at chokepoints and fords.
kubu.name: Kubu

pagar.desc: A defensive wall — cheap and tough. Channel the enemy into your towers.
pagar.name: Pagar

surau.desc: A prayer house — slowly heals nearby units and trickles a little camphor.
surau.name: Surau

panggung_panji.desc: A hero shrine — summon your faction's legendary Panji hero to lead your army.
panggung_panji.name: Panggung Panji

mahkota_monument.desc: A grand wonder — raise it, then hold it for 5 minutes to win by monument.
mahkota_monument.name: Mahkota Monument
